personas.name: Construction estimator (Germany)
personas.workflow: New project → import GAEB X83 → review validation report → adjust BOQ → cost rollup → PDF Angebot

personas.name: BIM coordinator
personas.workflow: Upload RVT → DDC cad2data converts → validate canonical → link elements to BOQ → run clash → export BCF → push to tender

personas.name: Sales manager (PropDev)
personas.workflow: Lead capture (webhook) → Qualified → Reservation → SPA generation (custom template) → payment schedule → handover checklist → warranty period

personas.name: Property buyer (external portal)
personas.workflow: Receive magic link → log into portal → view payment schedule → upload KYC docs → e-sign reservation → contact agent via portal chat

personas.name: Pricing manager
personas.workflow: Create price list → add 5 pricing rules (parking, view, floor, premium, discount) → activate → simulate on inventory → audit log of quote history

personas.name: HSE officer
personas.workflow: Log site incident → upload photos → assign corrective action → escalate to manager → close incident → verify audit log entry

personas.name: Project director (portfolio view)
personas.workflow: Global dashboard → 5-project drill-down → compare budgets → export custom report → schedule weekly digest email

personas.name: External broker (bid lifecycle)
personas.workflow: Receive bid invitation email → log into vendor portal → download tender package → upload quote (Excel) → win award → e-sign contract

personas.name: QA inspector
personas.workflow: Open daily diary → log activities + photos → create snag list entry → assign trade → resolve on punchlist → close with sign-off

personas.name: Tenant administrator
personas.workflow: Invite 5 users → assign roles (VIEWER / EDITOR / MANAGER / ADMIN / OWNER) → set module visibility per role → audit access log → revoke access for one user

regression_matrix.name: IDOR cross-tenant access returns 404 (never 403)
regression_matrix.check: Create resource as tenant-A; while logged in as tenant-B, GET/PATCH/DELETE → expect HTTP 404

regression_matrix.name: Money fields serialised as Decimal-as-string in JSON
regression_matrix.check: Inspect JSON: amount field must be string like "123.45", NOT float 123.45. Specifically watch CRM money fields, PropDev pricing, BOQ unit_rate, Finance ledger lines.

regression_matrix.name: Magic-byte upload validation rejects spoofed MIME
regression_matrix.scope: every upload endpoint accepting binary files
regression_matrix.check: PNG renamed *.pdf → upload returns 415 Unsupported Media Type with body referencing the actual detected type

regression_matrix.name: RBAC: EDITOR cannot perform MANAGER-only actions
regression_matrix.scope: every state-machine transition, every approve/reject endpoint
regression_matrix.check: Log in as EDITOR, attempt MANAGER action → expect 403; switch to MANAGER → expect 200

regression_matrix.name: Audit log entries fire on every write
regression_matrix.scope: POST / PUT / PATCH / DELETE across all modules
regression_matrix.check: After action, GET /api/v1/admin/audit-log?actor=me must include the verb + resource path within 2 seconds

regression_matrix.name: ETag + 304 short-circuit on dashboard endpoints
regression_matrix.check: First GET → 200 + ETag header; re-GET with If-None-Match → 304 + empty body

regression_matrix.name: Mobile viewport (375×667) renders without horizontal scroll
regression_matrix.check: Playwright set viewport 375×667; assert document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= window.innerWidth + 1

regression_matrix.name: Tab-key focus order is logical (top→bottom, left→right)
regression_matrix.check: Tab through, record document.activeElement bounding rect; assert non-decreasing y + ascending x within each row

regression_matrix.name: Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K palette, /, ?)
regression_matrix.check: Cmd+K opens command palette; / focuses search; ? opens shortcut help

regression_matrix.name: i18n completeness: no `__MISSING__` or untranslated EN string in DE/RU/AR
regression_matrix.check: Toggle locale; assert no DOM text matches /MISSING|t\(['"][a-z._]+['"]\)/

regression_matrix.name: Every list page renders an empty state on zero results
regression_matrix.check: Delete all rows or filter to none; assert visible illustrative copy + CTA (not blank canvas)

regression_matrix.name: Routes wrapped in error boundary recover from render exceptions
regression_matrix.check: Inject contrived render error via dev probe; assert error UI shown + retry button works

regression_matrix.name: API never returns NaN/Infinity (orjson rejects; default JSONResponse must be used)
regression_matrix.check: Force NaN via test fixture; assert response uses null/0 not NaN; DDC IFC bbox edge case is the trap

regression_matrix.name: Cookie-auth POST/PATCH/DELETE require CSRF token or are JWT-only
Rate limit returns 429 with Retry-After header
regression_matrix.check: Send 100 reqs in 10s; assert 429 with header
